function calculate_cumulative_sum(tuples) {  
  let total = 0;  
  function traverse(t) {  
    for (let i = 0; i < t.length; i++) {  
      if (typeof t[i] === 'number') {  
        total += t[i];  
      } else if (typeof t[i] === 'object') {  
        traverse(t[i]);  
      }  
    }  
  }  
  traverse(tuples);  
  return total;  
}  
******
